product_name: Hand-Painted Folk-Art Bar Stool — Grape & Vine
attributes: Late 20th c. • Folk-Art Hand-Painted • Grape & Vine Motif • Hardwood • 24" H
condition_notes: Decorative hardwood stool with a hand-painted folk-art grape-and-vine motif on a red ground; appears artist-signed on the top (signature partly legible). Late twentieth-century country/craft piece (folk-art revival, the sort common in American gift shops c. 1970s–1990s). Light oak legs with a single stretcher box. Distressed paint and surface wear consistent with decorative use; holds about 200 lbs. Measures approximately 24" H × 12" W × 12" D (seat). LOCAL PICKUP ONLY — too bulky to ship economically. Sold as found.
